basic_info.about: PSG College of Technology is an ISO 9001:2015 certified autonomous institution affiliated with Anna University. It is one of the foremost engineering colleges in India, established by PSG & Sons' Charities Trust. The campus is known for its strong industry-institute interaction and research focus.
basic_info.summary: A premier technical institution in Coimbatore offering a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programs in engineering, technology, computer applications, and management.

contact_info.address: Post Box No. 1611, Peelamedu, Coimbatore - 641004, Tamil Nadu, India

programs.raw_output:
PSG College of Technology \(PSGCT\) in Coimbatore offers a comprehensive range of academic programs across engineering, technology, applied sciences, and management. Its curriculum includes traditional 4\-year undergraduate degrees, specialized "Sandwich" programs, 5\-year integrated Master’s degrees, and doctoral research. [0] [9] [5] [1]

### Undergraduate Programs \(UG\)

The college offers 21 undergraduate programs primarily leading to B.E. \(Bachelor of Engineering\) and B.Tech. \(Bachelor of Technology\) degrees. [2]

- Regular B.E./B.Tech. \(4 Years\):
  - Automobile Engineering
  - Biomedical Engineering
  - Civil Engineering
  - Computer Science and Engineering
  - Computer Science and Engineering \(AI and ML\)
  - Electrical and Electronics Engineering
  - Electronics and Communication Engineering
  - Instrumentation and Control Engineering
  - Mechanical Engineering
  - Metallurgical Engineering
  - Production Engineering
  - Robotics and Automation
  - Biotechnology
  - Fashion Technology
  - Information Technology
  - Textile Technology
- Sandwich B.E. Programs \(5 Years\): These programs integrate industrial training with academic study.
  - Electrical and Electronics Engineering \(Sandwich\)
  - Mechanical Engineering \(Sandwich\)
  - Production Engineering \(Sandwich\)
- Bachelor of Science \(B.Sc. \- 3 Years\):
  - Applied Science
  - Computer Systems and Design

### Postgraduate Programs \(PG\)

PSGCT offers 24 postgraduate programs across various specialized disciplines. [2]

- M.E./M.Tech. Programs \(2 Years\):
  - Automotive Engineering
  - Biometrics and Cybersecurity
  - Computer Science and Engineering
  - Control Systems
  - Embedded & Real\-Time Systems
  - Engineering Design
  - Industrial Engineering
  - Manufacturing Engineering
  - Power Electronics and Drives
  - Structural Engineering
  - VLSI Design
  - Nano Science and Technology
  - Textile Technology
- Integrated M.Sc. Programs \(5 Years\): Students enter these programs after 12th grade.
  - Software Systems
  - Theoretical Computer Science
  - Data Science
  - Cyber Security
  - Fashion Design & Merchandising
- Other Postgraduate Degrees:
  - Master of Business Administration \(MBA\): Offered in General and Waste Management & Social Entrepreneurship tracks.
  - Master of Computer Applications \(MCA\): Focuses on advanced computer science applications.
  - M.Sc. Applied Mathematics \(2 Years\): A standard postgraduate science degree.

### Doctoral and Research Programs \(PhD\)

PSGCT is a recognized research center under Anna University, with over 500 scholars pursuing doctoral studies. [3] [6]

- Ph.D. Disciplines: Research is available in nearly all major departments, including:
  - Civil, Mechanical, and Electrical Engineering
  - Computer Science and Applications
  - Metallurgical Engineering and Textile Technology
  - Basic Sciences \(Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics\)
  - Management Sciences and Humanities
- M.S. \(by Research\): Offered in various engineering and technology streams for students focused on scholarly research careers.

For more information, you can visit the official [PSG College of Technology website](https://www.psgtech.edu/). [13]

Would you like details on the admission criteria or the placement records for any of these specific departments?

placements.graduate_outcomes_note: The 2026 placement cycle is currently ongoing; figures are projected based on mid-season trends and early-day offers from top-tier product companies.

placements.placement_highlights: PSG College of Technology continues to maintain a robust placement record with a median salary of 7 LPA for UG programs and up to 13.32 LPA for integrated PG programs according to NIRF 2025 data. Top offers frequently exceed 35-50 LPA from product giants like Texas Instruments and Microsoft, while core engineering placements remain a distinct strength due to the on-campus industrial institute.

fees.fees_note: Fee structure varies significantly between Government-Aided (approx. ₹25,000/year) and Self-Supporting courses (approx. ₹85,000–₹90,000/year). Listed values represent the average accredited fee as per TNEA and TANCET norms, which have remained relatively stable for regular programs over the last three cycles.

scholarships_detail.name: First Graduate Concession
scholarships_detail.eligibility: First graduate in the family admitted through TNEA counselling

scholarships_detail.name: Post-Matric Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: SC/ST candidates with family income below 2.5 Lakhs
scholarships_detail.provider: Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Department

scholarships_detail.name: Merit cum Means Scholarship
scholarships_detail.eligibility: Minority students with family income below 2.5 Lakhs

infrastructure.details: Three-storied building with a total area of approximately 57,720 sq. ft., featuring digital library segments, reference sections, and separate reading halls.
Specialized centers including the PSG-SIEMENS Center of Excellence, Industrial Institute, and various department-specific research labs.
Extensive facilities including tennis courts, gymnasiums, and multiple playgrounds for outdoor sports.
Campus-wide Wi-Fi, high-speed internet connectivity, and fully air-conditioned seminar halls with advanced audio-visual aids.

hostel_details.type: Separate Boys (7 blocks) and Girls (2 blocks) hostels

scholarships.name: BC/MBC/DNC Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: BC/MBC/DNC students; annual income not exceeding 2.50 lakhs

scholarships.name: SC/ST/SCC Post Matric Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: SC/ST/SCC students; annual income not exceeding 2.50 lakhs

scholarships.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
scholarships.eligibility: Female students pursuing technical degree; family income < 8 lakhs

scholarships.name: Alumni Endowment Scholarship
scholarships.eligibility: Meritorious and needy students as per specific endowment criteria

scholarships.name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarships
scholarships.eligibility: Students above 80th percentile in relevant Class XII board exams
